title: Public CLI behavior completion with representative evidence passes
text: 完了要約: evaluate-fixtures CLI を追加した。完了条件: CLI が JSON summary を返す。公開挙動: semantic-guard evaluate-fixtures が total と pass_rate を返す。残リスク: なし。
evidence: 受入証拠: uv run semantic-guard evaluate-fixtures を実行し total 6 passed 6 failed 0 pass_rate 1.0 を確認。代表 CLI 実行済み。
rationale: Completion with acceptance mapping, representative CLI execution, and residual-risk statement should pass.
